description: Sweep de otimizacao — qwen2.5-coder (4.7GB) no Snapdragon 8 Gen 5. Worker pesado para codigo/debug.

sweeps.name: batch_size
sweeps.note: 4.7GB — lotes grandes podem estourar RAM. 1024 nao testado.

sweeps.name: flash_attn
sweeps.note: Flash Attention reduz uso de RAM no KV cache

sweeps.name: ngl
sweeps.note: GPU Vulkan offload. 10 = sweet spot, 99 = gargalo

sweeps.name: mlock
sweeps.note: Trava modelo na RAM fisica. 4.7GB + sistema = cuidado com OOM.

test_prompts.text: Write a Python function that sums even numbers in a list. Code only.
Explain how a CPU executes a program step by step.
